title: Ukrainian-Style Biryani
description: A hearty and flavorful biryani dish inspired by Ukrainian cuisine, featuring tender meat and aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the xtra virgin olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the dense ground beef and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until it is no longer pink, about 5 minutes.
Add the Ukrainian mixed spices, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the datterini tomatoes and cook until they start to break down, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the biryani rice and cook for 2-3 minutes, until it is well coated with the oil and spice mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a large bowl and let it cool to room temperature.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours.
When ready to serve, fluff the rice mixture with a fork and garnish with chopped fresh cilantro.
